## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Related Issues

- Closes #
- Related #

## Type of Change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Technical debt

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Risk Assessment

Describe any risky areas and rollback strategy.

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is focused and does not include unrelated changes
- [ ] Docs updated when behavior/architecture changed
- [ ] Tests added or updated where relevant
